description.value: Price 1,600 gp; Slot head; CL 3rd; Weight 1/2 lb.; Aura none (see text) DESCRIPTION This simple, hand-painted party mask emanates no magical aura. Its true usefulness is revealed only when it’s worn. When a person dons the mask, she instantly assumes the appearance of single specific Small or Medium humanoid creature. Each mask has a single “face” that can’t be changed once the item is created. This effect otherwise works as disguise self. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 800 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells disguise self, magic aura
